input_text: Semua bisnes besar kat Malaysia ni dikuasai oleh kaum tertentu. Melayu memang takkan dapat peluang selagi mereka monopoli ekonomi kita.
reason: Ethnic economic conspiracy theory claiming one race monopolises all major businesses, fostering communal hostility and polarisation.
suggested_rewrite: Terdapat ketidakseimbangan ekonomi yang perlu ditangani melalui dasar inklusif supaya semua rakyat mendapat peluang yang adil.

input_text: Jangan tipu la, semua kontrak kerajaan masuk poket satu kaum je. Bangsa lain kerja macam kuda tapi duit semua disedut oleh mereka.
reason: Conspiracy theory about government contracts being monopolised by one ethnic group, with hostile framing and inter-ethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Proses pemberian kontrak kerajaan perlu lebih telus untuk memastikan semua rakyat mendapat peluang yang saksama.

input_text: Ekonomi negara ni memang dah lama dikuasai satu bangsa. Kita ni hanya jadi buruh untuk mereka. Bila nak sedar?
reason: Frames economic disparity as ethnic exploitation, promoting a conspiracy narrative that one race enslaves others economically.
suggested_rewrite: Ketidakseimbangan ekonomi adalah isu yang perlu ditangani bersama melalui dasar yang adil dan peluang sama rata.

input_text: Tengok la shopping mall besar tu, semua nama kedai kaum dia. Kita ni jadi pelanggan je selamanya, tak pernah jadi pemilik.
reason: Conspiracy framing that shopping malls are ethnically dominated, painting the speaker's group as perpetual victims of economic exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: Penyertaan pelbagai kaum dalam sektor perniagaan perlu digalakkan melalui sokongan keusahawanan yang menyeluruh.

input_text: Kantin sekolah tu serve makanan tak halal sebelah makanan halal. Memang sengaja nak cemarkan makanan anak-anak Islam kita. Ini provokasi terang-terangan!
reason: Accuses a school canteen of deliberately contaminating halal food, framing dietary co-existence as intentional religious provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Kantin sekolah perlu memastikan pengurusan makanan halal dan bukan halal mengikut garis panduan yang ditetapkan untuk keselesaan semua pelajar.

input_text: Dah la duduk kat negara Islam, tapi nak makan babi terang-terangan kat food court. Langsung tak hormat perasaan orang Islam. Balik negara asal la!
reason: Hostile commentary about non-halal food in shared spaces, with 'go back to your country' language targeting non-Muslim Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Di ruang makan berkongsi, pengurusan makanan halal dan bukan halal perlu diuruskan dengan sensitiviti agar semua pihak selesa.

input_text: Setiap kali dekat sekolah kebangsaan ada aktiviti, mesti nak selitkan unsur agama lain. Ini sekolah Islam ke sekolah campur? Jangan nak sesat kan anak kita!
reason: Claims school activities deliberately expose Muslim children to other religions, framing multicultural education as religious corruption.
suggested_rewrite: Aktiviti sekolah kebangsaan perlu mengambil kira sensitiviti agama semua pelajar sambil memupuk persefahaman antara budaya.

input_text: Food court baru tu siap letak gerai babi sebelah gerai nasi campur Melayu. Memang nak buat provokasi la tu. Boikot!
reason: Calls for boycott over food court layout, framing stall placement as deliberate anti-Muslim provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Food court perlu mengatur kedudukan gerai dengan lebih baik untuk memastikan keselesaan pelanggan dari pelbagai latar belakang.

input_text: Perayaan Thaipusam tu bising gila, jalanan kotor, macam-macam benda pelik. Kenapa kita kena tahan semua ni? Negara Islam buat perayaan kafir macam ni.
reason: Mockery of Thaipusam as a 'kafir' festival, dehumanising Hindu religious practices and questioning their right to celebrate in Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: Perayaan Thaipusam memerlukan pengurusan trafik dan kebersihan yang lebih baik. Malaysia menghormati kepelbagaian agama dalam semangat perpaduan.

input_text: Tiap kali CNY, mercun sana sini sampai tak boleh tidur. Sembahyang pagi pun terganggu. Perayaan orang kafir ni memang buat huru-hara.
reason: Labels Chinese New Year as 'kafir' festival causing chaos, mocking cultural celebrations and framing them as a threat to Muslim prayer.
suggested_rewrite: Bunyi mercun semasa CNY memang mengganggu sesetengah pihak. Pihak berkuasa perlu menguatkuasakan peraturan bunyi bising untuk keselesaan semua.

input_text: Upacara sembahyang mereka tu macam buat sihir je. Api sana sini, bunyi pelik. Patut la negara kita makin mundur, sebab benda-benda karut macam ni.
reason: Mocks Hindu prayer rituals as witchcraft and blames national regression on their religious practices. Clear targeting of a religious group.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap agama mempunyai upacara tersendiri yang bermakna kepada penganutnya. Memahami kepelbagaian budaya membantu memupuk perpaduan.

input_text: Nama dia Ahmad tapi kerja kat syarikat Cina, mesti dah jadi kaki bodek. Pengkhianat bangsa memang patut kena kutuk.
reason: Labels a Malay person working at a Chinese company as a race traitor, encouraging communal ostracism and targeted abuse.
suggested_rewrite: Bekerja di syarikat pelbagai kaum adalah perkara biasa dan menunjukkan semangat perpaduan dalam dunia profesional.

input_text: Aku tahu siapa yang buat report kat HR tu. Si Muthu dari department sebelah. Kerja kat [nama syarikat] Shah Alam. Semua orang share nama dia, biar dia rasa.
reason: Partial doxxing with workplace details, encouraging a revenge campaign against someone who filed an HR report.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada masalah dengan laporan HR, selesaikan melalui saluran rasmi syarikat dan bukannya mendedahkan maklumat peribadi orang lain.

input_text: Cikgu sekolah anak aku ni memang pemalas. Nama dia Cikgu Faridah, SK [nama sekolah], Kuantan. Share supaya pihak berkuasa ambil tindakan.
reason: Names a specific teacher with school and location details for public shaming, constituting partial doxxing and targeted abuse.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada aduan tentang guru, sila laporkan kepada pihak pentadbiran sekolah atau Jabatan Pendidikan Negeri melalui saluran rasmi.

input_text: Korang kenal tak driver Grab bernama Aziz area Subang? Dia kacau customer perempuan. Semua passenger perempuan kena report dia dan share no plate dia WKJ [nombor].
reason: Shares partial identifying details of a Grab driver including name, area, and vehicle plate number, inciting collective action without police report.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda mengalami gangguan daripada pemandu e-hailing, sila buat laporan polis dan aduan rasmi kepada syarikat e-hailing berkenaan.

input_text: PRU ni kalau kaum dia yang menang, habis la negara kita. Mereka memang nak rampas kuasa dan hapuskan hak kita. Jangan bagi peluang!
reason: Frames election as existential ethnic threat, claiming another race winning will destroy the country. Clear communal hostility during campaign period.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat berhak memilih wakil rakyat pilihan masing-masing. Proses demokrasi harus dihormati tanpa mengira latar belakang calon.

input_text: Undi calon Melayu Islam sahaja. Kalau bukan Islam yang perintah, agama kita akan dihina dan masjid akan ditutup. Ini jihad politik!
reason: Uses religious fear-mongering to influence voting, claiming non-Muslim leaders will shut mosques. Frames election as religious jihad.
suggested_rewrite: Pilihlah calon yang terbaik berdasarkan integriti dan kebolehan tanpa mengira latar belakang. Kebebasan beragama dijamin oleh Perlembagaan.

input_text: Banjir kat Kelantan tu sebab pemimpin kafir yang jadi menteri alam sekitar. Tuhan dah tunjuk tanda, kita masih nak pilih orang bukan Islam ke?
reason: Blames natural disaster on a non-Muslim minister as divine punishment, spreading dangerous misinformation to incite communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Banjir di Kelantan memerlukan respons kecemasan dan pelan mitigasi yang lebih baik. Semua pihak perlu bekerjasama untuk menangani bencana alam.

input_text: Tanah runtuh tu sebab orang Cina buat projek haram kat bukit. Mereka tak kisah alam sekitar, asalkan duit masuk poket sendiri. Nyawa orang Melayu murah bagi mereka.
reason: Blames landslide on Chinese developers with ethnic generalisation, claiming they don't value Malay lives. Communal blame-shifting after disaster.
suggested_rewrite: Tanah runtuh ini perlu disiasat oleh pihak berkuasa. Pembangunan di kawasan berbukit mesti mematuhi peraturan keselamatan tanpa mengira siapa pemajunya.

input_text: Tengok la banjir kilat KL tu. Semua longkang tersumbat sebab pendatang asing buang sampah merata. Usir semua balik negara mereka!
reason: Blames flash floods entirely on foreign workers and calls for mass deportation. Scapegoating and hostile rhetoric after natural disaster.
suggested_rewrite: Banjir kilat KL disebabkan pelbagai faktor termasuk saliran yang kurang baik. Pengurusan sisa pepejal perlu diperbaiki untuk semua penduduk.

input_text: Bahasa Melayu ni patut dimansuhkan sebagai bahasa rasmi. Zaman sekarang siapa guna BM? Bahasa kaum mundur je yang nak pertahankan benda usang ni.
reason: Calls for abolishing Bahasa Melayu as national language and labels its speakers as backward. Attacks constitutional provisions and Malay cultural identity.
suggested_rewrite: Penguasaan pelbagai bahasa adalah kelebihan. Bahasa Melayu sebagai bahasa rasmi mempunyai kedudukan dalam Perlembagaan dan boleh diperkukuh bersama bahasa lain.

input_text: Sekolah vernakular tu memang pecahbelahkan negara. Tutup semua SJKC dan SJKT, baru anak-anak bersatu. Selagi sekolah kaum ada, selagi tu kita berpecah.
reason: Calls for closing all vernacular schools as ethnically divisive. Inflammatory language targeting Chinese and Tamil school communities.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem pendidikan perlu memperkukuh perpaduan sambil menghormati hak pendidikan pelbagai bahasa yang dijamin Perlembagaan.

input_text: Mandarin speakers only tu memang code word untuk 'tak nak Melayu'. Syarikat Cina memang rasis, tak nak hire orang kita. Boikot semua!
reason: Frames Mandarin job requirements as racial discrimination code, calling for boycott of all Chinese businesses. Communal hostility in economic context.
suggested_rewrite: Syarat bahasa dalam iklan kerja perlu relevan dengan keperluan jawatan. Isu diskriminasi pekerjaan boleh dilaporkan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja.

input_text: Hari Raya jemput semua jiran kecuali kaum tu la. Buat apa jemput, nanti makanan kita pun tak makan sebab tak halal. Baik tak payah.
reason: Advocates excluding specific ethnic groups from Hari Raya celebration based on dietary differences, promoting communal segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Hari Raya adalah peluang untuk mengeratkan hubungan kejiranan. Semua jiran boleh dijemput dengan menyediakan pilihan makanan yang sesuai untuk semua.

input_text: Saya dah kenal siapa pencuri kat taman ni. Suresh yang tinggal kat blok C unit [nombor]. Kawan-kawan jom kita bagi dia pengajaran malam ni.
reason: Identifies a person by name and address as a thief and organises vigilante action. Partial doxxing with incitement to violence.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda mengesyaki pencurian, sila buat laporan polis dan maklumkan kepada pihak pengurusan taman perumahan.

input_text: Budak sekolah yang buli anak aku tu nama dia Hakim, darjah 5, SK [nama sekolah] Kajang. Parents dia tinggal kat [nama taman]. Semua parents share dan viralkan!
reason: Doxxes a minor (school child) with school, grade, and residential area details, calling for viral sharing. Targets a child for public shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Kes buli di sekolah perlu dilaporkan kepada pihak pentadbiran sekolah dan PIBG untuk tindakan yang sewajarnya.

input_text: Pemuda UMNO kawasan ni dah jual tanah Melayu kat developer Cina. Pengkhianat! Nama dia Fikri bin [nama]. Share sampai viral biar dia kena!
reason: Names a political member as ethnic traitor for alleged land sale to Chinese developers. Doxxing combined with communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Isu penjualan tanah rizab Melayu perlu disiasat oleh pihak berkuasa. Laporkan kepada SPRM jika ada bukti penyelewengan.

input_text: Jangan undi calon India kat kawasan kita. Bila dia dah berkuasa, dia akan utamakan kaum dia je. Tak pernah ada calon India yang jaga orang Melayu.
reason: Urges voters to reject Indian candidates based purely on ethnicity, claiming they only serve their own race. Ethnic discrimination in election context.
suggested_rewrite: Pilihlah calon berdasarkan rekod prestasi dan integriti mereka, bukan berdasarkan latar belakang kaum.

input_text: Gempa bumi tu tanda Allah murka sebab terlalu banyak rumah ibadat bukan Islam dibina. Kita kena musnahkan semua kuil sebelum terlambat.
reason: Claims natural disaster is divine punishment for non-Muslim places of worship, calling for their destruction. Religious incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Gempa bumi adalah bencana alam yang memerlukan persediaan dan tindak balas kecemasan yang baik. Malaysia menghormati kebebasan beragama semua rakyatnya.

input_text: Kali ni banjir besar sebab dosa orang bukan Islam makin menjadi-jadi. Balasan tuhan dah sampai. Taubat la semua!
reason: Blames major flood on sins of non-Muslims as divine retribution. Dangerous misinformation combined with religious provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Banjir besar adalah bencana alam yang memerlukan kerjasama semua pihak untuk menanganinya. Bantuan perlu disalurkan kepada semua mangsa tanpa mengira latar belakang.

input_text: Cina buat kilang haram kat sungai, lepas tu banjir semua orang Melayu yang kena. Dah berapa kali dah macam ni tapi tak pernah ambil tindakan.
reason: Blames Chinese factories for floods affecting Malays. Ethnic scapegoating with unverified claims about illegal factories.
suggested_rewrite: Pencemaran sungai oleh kilang haram perlu disiasat dan dihentikan tanpa mengira siapa pemiliknya. Lapor kepada JAS untuk tindakan.

input_text: Orang India memang suka mabuk dan buat kacau. Tengok la setiap hujung minggu kat kawasan mereka. Patut la kawasan tu asyik banjir, kotor sangat.
reason: Stereotypes Indian Malaysians as drunkards and troublemakers, linking ethnic areas to filth and flooding. Clear racial targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah keselamatan dan kebersihan awam perlu ditangani di semua kawasan melalui penguatkuasaan dan kesedaran komuniti.

input_text: Vaccine COVID tu memang agenda Yahudi nak bunuh orang Islam. Kerajaan Malaysia dah jadi boneka mereka. Jangan ambil vaksin!
reason: Spreads dangerous anti-vaccine conspiracy theory targeting a religious group (Jews) and discouraging vaccination. Life-threatening misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Vaksin COVID telah diluluskan oleh KKM dan badan kesihatan antarabangsa. Dapatkan maklumat vaksin daripada sumber rasmi seperti MySejahtera.

input_text: Air paip kat kawasan Melayu sengaja dicemari oleh syarikat air yang dikuasai kaum Cina. Mereka nak buat kita sakit supaya boleh jual ubat mahal.
reason: Conspiracy theory that Chinese-owned water companies deliberately poison Malay areas. Dangerous health misinformation with ethnic targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Kualiti air paip dipantau oleh SPAN dan KKM. Sebarang masalah kualiti air boleh dilaporkan kepada pihak berkuasa untuk siasatan.

input_text: Ubat tradisional Cina tu semua ada bahan haram dan najis. Mereka sengaja letak dalam ubat supaya orang Melayu tak boleh solat. Jangan beli!
reason: Claims Chinese traditional medicine contains haram ingredients to sabotage Muslim prayers. Dangerous health misinformation with religious provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Ubat tradisional perlu mempunyai kelulusan KKM dan pensijilan halal jika berkaitan. Semak status halal produk di portal JAKIM sebelum membeli.

input_text: They control all the banks, the telcos, the property market. Wake up people, one race owns everything in this country and the rest of us are just slaves.
reason: English-language ethnic economic conspiracy theory claiming one race controls all key industries, using inflammatory 'slaves' language.
suggested_rewrite: There are concerns about economic concentration in certain sectors. Policies promoting fair competition and inclusive participation would benefit all Malaysians.

input_text: Why these people insist on cooking pork right next to our stalls at the pasar malam? They know we are Muslim majority area. This is deliberate disrespect to our religion.
reason: Frames non-halal food preparation near Muslim stalls as deliberate religious disrespect, escalating a coexistence issue into communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Food stall arrangements at pasar malam should consider halal sensitivities. Proper spacing and clear labelling can help everyone coexist respectfully.

input_text: Deepavali celebration also want to burn crackers until 3am. No respect for others at all. These people think this is their grandfather's country is it?
reason: Hostile rhetoric about Deepavali celebrations using 'these people' and 'grandfather's country' language to delegitimise Indian Malaysians' belonging.
suggested_rewrite: Late-night firecrackers during Deepavali can be disruptive. Authorities should enforce noise regulations while respecting cultural celebrations.

input_text: This woman from [company name] Petaling Jaya cheated my friend RM5000. Her name is Mei Ling, works at level 3 accounts department. Everyone please share and make her viral.
reason: Name-and-shame post with specific workplace, floor, and department details. Encourages viral sharing as revenge without due process.
suggested_rewrite: If someone has cheated you financially, please lodge a police report and pursue legal channels rather than sharing personal details publicly.

input_text: This election if DAP wins your area, confirm church will replace surau. They already have a plan to Christianise Malaysia. Wake up Malays!
reason: Spreads dangerous misinformation about a political party's alleged Christianisation agenda. Designed to provoke communal fear during elections.
suggested_rewrite: Evaluate all political candidates based on their policies and track record. Religious freedom for all faiths is protected by the Constitution.

input_text: Why force everyone to learn Bahasa Melayu? It's a useless language internationally. Only backward people cling to such an irrelevant language in the modern world.
reason: Calls Bahasa Melayu useless and its speakers backward. Hostile rhetoric attacking constitutional language rights and Malay cultural identity.
suggested_rewrite: While multilingualism is valuable, Bahasa Melayu holds constitutional significance as the national language. Strengthening multiple languages can coexist with this.

input_text: This contractor Ah Hock from [company] in Klang cheated so many people already. I have his IC number and home address. DM me if you want to go confront him together.
reason: Offers to share IC number and home address for a confrontation. Partial doxxing with revenge coordination against a named individual.
suggested_rewrite: If a contractor has cheated you, file a report with the police and the Consumer Tribunal. Do not share personal details or plan confrontations.

input_text: If you see this delivery rider plate number [number] Yamaha Y15 blue colour, beware. He stole my parcel. Name is Rizal. Everyone help me find where he stays.
reason: Shares vehicle details and name of delivery rider, soliciting help to find his home address. Vigilante coordination with partial doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: If your parcel was stolen, report to the delivery company and lodge a police report. They can track the rider through official channels.

input_text: Vote wisely this PRU. If the Malay candidate wins, say goodbye to Chinese schools, Chinese businesses, and Chinese rights. They want to turn this into an Islamic state.
reason: Spreads misinformation that Malay candidates will eliminate Chinese institutions. Fear-mongering to polarise voters along ethnic lines.
suggested_rewrite: Voters should evaluate candidates on their policy platforms and track records. Constitutional protections exist for all communities' rights.

input_text: Flood in Johor is because too many illegal temples built by Indians blocking the waterways. Government should demolish all of them immediately.
reason: Falsely blames flooding on Indian temples, calling for demolition. Combines dangerous misinformation with communal hostility after disaster.
suggested_rewrite: Flooding in Johor requires proper drainage infrastructure. Any structures affecting waterways should be assessed by authorities regardless of their nature.

input_text: Don't trust the 5G towers they are building in Malay kampung areas. It's a Chinese tech company plan to spy on Muslims and control our minds through radiation.
reason: Conspiracy theory about 5G targeting Muslims, combining anti-Chinese sentiment with dangerous technology misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: 5G technology has been evaluated by MCMC for safety compliance. For information about telecommunications infrastructure, refer to official MCMC guidelines.

input_text: Those Bangladeshi workers are all criminals and rapists. Every crime in this area is because of them. Government should round them all up and throw them out.
reason: Dehumanises Bangladeshi workers as criminals and rapists, calling for mass detention and deportation. Targeted abuse of a vulnerable group.
suggested_rewrite: Crime prevention requires proper law enforcement regardless of the perpetrator's background. Migrant worker management should follow humane legal processes.

input_text: This so-called ustaz from Masjid [nama] in Gombak is secretly having affairs. I know where he lives, [taman name]. Share this to expose him.
reason: Doxxes a religious leader with mosque and residential details based on unverified affair claims. Public shaming with identifying information.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about religious leaders should be reported to the relevant Islamic religious authority for proper investigation.

input_text: Chinese always talk behind our backs in their language at work. They are scheming against Malay staff all the time. Never trust a Chinese colleague, they will backstab you.
reason: Warns against trusting all Chinese colleagues, claiming they constantly scheme against Malays. Hostile workplace ethnic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace communication should be inclusive. If language barriers cause misunderstandings, raise the issue professionally with management.

input_text: We all know that the Chinese control the media in this country. That's why Malay issues never get covered. They are systematically erasing our voice. Time to fight back!
reason: Conspiracy theory about Chinese media control silencing Malays, with a call to 'fight back'. Dangerous misinformation with incitement undertone.
suggested_rewrite: Media diversity is important for fair representation. Concerns about media coverage can be raised with media councils and regulatory bodies.

input_text: All the top universities secretly have quotas to limit Chinese students. They don't want us to succeed. The system is rigged against non-Bumis from day one.
reason: Claims secret quotas against Chinese students, framing the education system as a conspiracy. Inflammatory misinformation promoting ethnic grievance.
suggested_rewrite: University admissions policies should be transparent and merit-based. Concerns about fairness can be raised through official channels and education reform advocacy.

input_text: Every year sure got one Chinese towkay kena caught for environmental crime but nothing happens because they pay off the authorities. Only Malay businesses kena penalise.
reason: Claims Chinese business owners bribe authorities to avoid environmental penalties while only Malays are punished. Ethnic conspiracy with misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Environmental enforcement should apply equally to all businesses. Report suspected corruption to MACC for proper investigation.

input_text: Actually the real problem in Malaysia is the Malays want everything handed to them. Bumi discount, MARA, ASB - all spoon-fed. No wonder the country cannot progress.
reason: Attacks Malay community as lazy freeloaders, dismissing affirmative action as spoon-feeding. Hostile ethnic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Affirmative action policies should be periodically reviewed to ensure they achieve their intended goals while promoting economic growth for all Malaysians.

input_text: Look at this video of the Indian worker sleeping on the job at [company name]. These people are all like that. Share it until the company fires all the Indian workers there.
reason: Shares video targeting an Indian worker and calls for firing all Indian employees at the company. Ethnic targeting with privacy exposure.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace performance issues should be handled by management through proper HR processes, not by publicly targeting individuals or ethnic groups.

input_text: You know why Malay area always flood? Because their politicians only know how to steal money, never build proper infrastructure. Hopeless race with hopeless leaders.
reason: Calls Malays a 'hopeless race' and blames flooding entirely on their leaders' corruption. Dehumanising ethnic attack.
suggested_rewrite: Flood mitigation requires proper infrastructure investment. All communities deserve effective leadership and disaster preparedness.

input_text: Confirm these foreigners are the ones spreading disease in our country. COVID, TB, all from them. Government should quarantine all foreign workers in one place away from us.
reason: Blames foreign workers for all diseases and calls for mass quarantine. Dangerous health misinformation with dehumanising rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Public health measures should apply to everyone. Disease prevention requires proper healthcare access for all residents including migrant workers.

input_text: Don't rent to Malay tenants. They always pay late, dirty the house, and cook smelly food that stains the walls. My property value dropped 20% because of Malay neighbours.
reason: Advises against renting to Malays with derogatory stereotypes about cleanliness and food. Racial discrimination in housing.
suggested_rewrite: Tenant selection should be based on rental history and financial capability, not ethnicity. Clear rental agreements protect both landlords and tenants.

input_text: Eh you know ah the teacher that kena caught with student? She's from [school name] in Seremban. Her husband also teacher at the same school. Let's make sure whole Seremban knows.
reason: Spreads identifying details about a teacher involved in alleged misconduct, including school and spouse. Doxxing campaign for public humiliation.
suggested_rewrite: Allegations of teacher misconduct should be reported to the school administration and education department. Spreading personal details is harmful.

input_text: These Indians always play victim card la. Got reservation, got MIC, got Tamil school but still complain. If don't like Malaysia, there's always a flight to Chennai you know.
reason: Dismisses Indian Malaysians' concerns and tells them to leave Malaysia. 'Go back' rhetoric targeting citizens based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysians have the right to voice concerns. Addressing community issues requires constructive dialogue, not dismissal.

input_text: If Malay cannot even compete without tongkat, what makes you think they can run the country? Remove all the special privileges then we see who really can perform.
reason: Uses derogatory 'tongkat' (crutch) metaphor to demean Malays and challenges constitutional provisions. Hostile rhetoric against affirmative action.
suggested_rewrite: Discussions about affirmative action policies should focus on evidence-based reforms that promote competitiveness while ensuring no community is left behind.

input_text: 每次发洪水都是因为马来人的领导无能。这种政府只会照顾自己人，华人的命根本不值钱。
reason: Blames flooding on Malay leadership incompetence and claims Chinese lives are worthless to the government. Ethnic blame-shifting after disaster.
suggested_rewrite: 水灾管理需要改善。政府应公平分配救灾资源，不分种族地帮助所有受灾民众。

input_text: 华人的学校被关闭的那一天就是我们必须反击的日子。马来人要消灭我们的文化，我们绝不能坐以待毙！
reason: Frames potential school closures as cultural genocide by Malays and calls for fighting back. Incitement language with communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 华文教育的权益应通过合法途径和对话来维护。各族群的教育权利受到宪法的保障。

input_text: 选举到了，如果你们再投马来人的党，华人就永远是二等公民。他们只会压迫我们，抢走我们的教育权和经济权！
reason: Frames elections as ethnic zero-sum game, claiming Malay parties will oppress Chinese Malaysians and strip their rights. Inflammatory election rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: 选举时应根据候选人的政策和能力做选择，而不是基于种族。各族群的权益受到宪法保障。

input_text: 这次大选一定要团结起来对抗巫统。他们的政策就是要把华人赶出马来西亚，我们要用选票保护自己！
reason: Claims UMNO wants to expel Chinese from Malaysia, spreading dangerous misinformation to mobilise ethnic voting blocs.
suggested_rewrite: 选举是民主权利。选民应基于政策和治理记录来评估各政党，而非受族群恐惧影响。

input_text: 每次水灾都是因为那些外劳乱丢垃圾堵塞沟渠。政府应该立刻把他们全部遣返回国，不然我们永远有水灾。
reason: Scapegoats foreign workers for all floods and calls for mass deportation. Dangerous misinformation combined with hostile rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: 水灾有多种原因包括排水系统不足。垃圾管理需要所有居民和当局共同努力改善。

input_text: 印度人就是喜欢喝酒闹事，每次我们这区出事都是他们搞的。应该把他们全部赶到一个地方住，别来影响我们。
reason: Stereotypes Indians as drunkards and troublemakers, calling for residential segregation. Clear ethnic targeting with hostile rhetoric in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 社区安全问题需要通过适当的执法来解决，不应归咎于任何特定族群。所有居民都有权自由选择居住地点。

input_text: 马来人除了会靠政府补贴还会什么？没有特权他们什么都做不了。这个国家的经济全靠华人在撑。
reason: Demeans Malays as entirely dependent on government subsidies and claims Chinese solely sustain the economy. Ethnic supremacist hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 经济发展是全民共同努力的成果。各项政策应该帮助所有有需要的群体，促进公平竞争。

input_text: 这些马来人老板从不给华人升职。他们的公司就是种族歧视的温床。以后华人不要去马来人的公司工作了。
reason: Claims all Malay bosses discriminate against Chinese employees, calling for Chinese to boycott Malay companies. Ethnic workplace polarisation.
suggested_rewrite: 职场歧视是不可接受的。如果遇到不公平待遇，可以向人力资源部门或劳工部投诉。

input_text: 印度尼西亚女佣偷东西是常态了。请了三个，三个都偷。这个种族就是这样，天生小偷。以后别请印尼人。
reason: Labels all Indonesian domestic workers as natural-born thieves based on personal experience. Racist generalisation targeting a national group.
suggested_rewrite: 如果遇到家庭帮佣偷窃问题，应向警方报案并联系中介公司。不应将个人经历归咎于整个族群。

input_text: 华人不应该和马来人通婚。嫁给马来人就等于放弃了自己的文化和宗教。这种人是华人的叛徒。
reason: Condemns intermarriage between Chinese and Malays, labelling those who do as racial traitors. Ethnic hostility targeting individual marriage choices.
suggested_rewrite: 婚姻是个人选择。不同文化和宗教背景的人结合可以促进理解和尊重，丰富马来西亚的多元社会。

input_text: 马来政客说要把华文学校全部关闭。看吧，他们就是要消灭华人文化。我们要组织起来抗议，不惜一切代价保护我们的学校！
reason: Spreads misinformation about plans to close Chinese schools and calls for resistance 'at all costs'. Inflammatory mobilisation based on unverified claims.
suggested_rewrite: 华文教育的权益可以通过合法途径来维护。关注教育政策变化，通过正式渠道表达意见和建议。

input_text: 这些马来人开斋节放鞭炮到凌晨三点，完全不考虑别人的感受。自私的民族，只顾自己开心。以后我也半夜在他们门口放音乐报复。
reason: Labels Malays as a selfish race over Hari Raya celebrations and plans noise retaliation. Ethnic hostility with revenge language.
suggested_rewrite: 节日噪音问题可以通过友好沟通或向地方当局反映来解决。互相尊重是多元社会和谐共处的基础。

input_text: 华人老板就是黑心，工资低得可怜还要员工加班。马来员工被欺负最惨，因为华人老板只照顾自己人。
reason: Stereotypes all Chinese bosses as exploitative and discriminatory against Malay workers. Ethnic generalisation promoting workplace hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 劳工权益问题应向劳工部投诉。所有雇主都必须遵守最低工资和工作时间规定，不分种族。

input_text: 那个马来女人在我们华人餐厅投诉说有猪肉味，还叫卫生局来检查。她住在[花园名]，大家记住她的脸，以后别让她进来。
reason: Identifies a Malay woman's residential area for filing a legitimate halal complaint, calling for retaliation by banning her. Doxxing with ethnic targeting.
suggested_rewrite: 顾客有权提出食品安全投诉。餐厅应确保清楚标示食材成分，尊重不同饮食需求。

input_text: 这些印度人的宗教仪式太恶心了，杀鸡放血搞得到处都是。这种野蛮行为不应该在文明社会存在。
reason: Calls Hindu religious rituals disgusting and barbaric. Dehumanising language targeting Indian religious practices in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 宗教仪式有其文化和精神意义。如果有卫生问题的担忧，可以向有关当局反映，同时尊重宗教多样性。

input_text: மலாய்க்காரங்க எல்லாம் சோம்பேறிங்க. அரசாங்க உதவி இல்லாம ஒன்னும் பண்ண மாட்டாங்க. நம்ம இந்தியர்கள்தான் கஷ்டப்பட்டு உழைக்கிறோம்.
reason: Tamil-language stereotype calling all Malays lazy and claiming only Indians work hard. Ethnic denigration promoting communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொரு தனிநபரின் உழைப்பும் மதிக்கத்தக்கது. இனத்தின் அடிப்படையில் யாரையும் தீர்மானிக்க முடியாது.

input_text: சீனர்கள் எல்லாம் பேராசைக்காரங்க. நம்ம நாட்டோட செல்வத்தை எல்லாம் அவங்க சுரண்டிட்டாங்க. இந்தியர்களுக்கு ஒன்னும் மிச்சம் வைக்கல.
reason: Labels all Chinese as greedy exploiters of national wealth in Tamil. Ethnic economic conspiracy theory promoting communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: பொருளாதார சமத்துவமின்மை அனைத்து சமூகங்களையும் பாதிக்கிறது. நியாயமான கொள்கைகள் மூலம் இதை சரிசெய்ய வேண்டும்.

input_text: மசூதியில இருந்து வர்ற சத்தம் தாங்க முடியல. காதை கிழிக்குது ஒவ்வொரு நாளும். இந்த நாடு இந்துக்களுக்கும் சொந்தம், நம்மளையும் மதிக்கணும்.
reason: Hostile complaint about mosque prayer calls in Tamil, using aggressive language ('ear-splitting') about Islamic worship practices.
suggested_rewrite: ஒலி அளவு குறித்த கவலைகளை உள்ளூர் அதிகாரிகளிடம் மரியாதையாக தெரிவிக்கலாம். அனைத்து மதங்களின் வழிபாட்டு உரிமைகளும் மதிக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: தேர்தல்ல மலாய் கட்சிக்கு ஓட்டு போட்டா நம்ம கோவில் எல்லாம் இடிச்சுடுவாங்க. இந்துக்களுக்கு எதிரா சட்டம் போடுவாங்க. எச்சரிக்கையா இருங்க!
reason: Tamil election misinformation claiming Malay parties will demolish all temples and pass anti-Hindu laws. Fear-mongering to polarise voters.
suggested_rewrite: தேர்தலில் கொள்கைகள் மற்றும் செயல்திறன் அடிப்படையில் வேட்பாளர்களை மதிப்பிடுங்கள். அனைத்து சமூகங்களின் உரிமைகளும் அரசியலமைப்பால் பாதுகாக்கப்படுகின்றன.

input_text: இந்த பள்ளிக்கூடத்தில் இஸ்லாமிய நிகழ்ச்சிகளை கட்டாயமாக்குறாங்க. நம்ம இந்து பிள்ளைகளை மதம் மாற்ற பார்க்குறாங்க. பெற்றோர்களே எழுங்க!
reason: Claims schools are forcing Islamic events to convert Hindu children. Dangerous misinformation about religious conversion in education.
suggested_rewrite: பள்ளி நிகழ்ச்சிகள் குறித்த கவலைகளை பெற்றோர் ஆசிரியர் சங்கம் மூலம் தெரிவிக்கலாம். அனைத்து மாணவர்களின் மத உரிமைகள் பாதுகாக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: நம்ம ஏரியாவில் திருடன ஒருத்தன் இருக்கான். அவன் பேரு ரஹ்மான், [தெரு பெயர்] ல குடியிருக்கான். எல்லாரும் சேர்ந்து அவனுக்கு பாடம் படிப்போம்.
reason: Tamil doxxing post naming a person and street, calling for collective vigilante punishment. Privacy exposure with revenge coordination.
suggested_rewrite: திருட்டு சம்பவங்களை காவல் துறையிடம் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். சட்டத்தை கையில் எடுக்காதீர்கள்.

input_text: இந்த கடை காரன் சீனக்காரன் நம்ம தமிழ் பிள்ளைகளை அவமானப்படுத்திட்டான். கடை பேரு [பெயர்], [இடம்]. போய் கடையை மூடச் சொல்லுங்க!
reason: Names a shop and location to organise communal retaliation against a Chinese shopkeeper. Doxxing with ethnic targeting.
suggested_rewrite: பிள்ளைகளை அவமானப்படுத்துவது தவறு. சம்பவத்தை காவல் துறையிடம் புகார் செய்யுங்கள்.

input_text: மலாய்க்காரங்க அரசாங்க வேலையில் மட்டும்தான் சாதிக்க முடியும். தனியார் நிறுவனத்தில் வேலை செய்யும் திறன் அவர்களுக்கு இல்லை.
reason: Claims Malays can only succeed in government jobs and lack ability for private sector. Ethnic stereotype demeaning Malay capability in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: அனைத்து இனத்தவரும் அரசு மற்றும் தனியார் துறைகளில் சிறப்பாக பணியாற்ற முடியும். தனிநபர் திறமையே வெற்றியை தீர்மானிக்கிறது.

input_text: மசூதி கட்டுறதுக்கு அனுமதி உடனே கிடைக்குது. ஆனா கோவில் கட்ட பத்து வருஷம் ஆகுது. இந்த அரசாங்கம் இந்துக்களை அழிக்க பார்க்குது.
reason: Claims government aims to destroy Hindus through discriminatory temple approval processes. Religious misinformation promoting victimhood.
suggested_rewrite: வழிபாட்டு தலங்களின் கட்டிட அனுமதி செயல்முறை அனைத்து மதங்களுக்கும் நியாயமாக இருக்க வேண்டும். கவலைகளை உள்ளூர் நிர்வாகத்திடம் தெரிவிக்கலாம்.

input_text: நம்ம ஏரியாவில் அந்த மலாய் கடைக்காரன் தமிழ் பெண்களை கேவலமா பேசுறான். கடை பேரு [பெயர்], [சாலை பெயர்]. எல்லாரும் போய் அவன் கடையை மூட வையுங்க!
reason: Names a shop and location for communal retaliation, organising group action to force closure. Doxxing with vigilante intent in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: சொல்லால் துன்புறுத்தல் தவறு. காவல் துறையில் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். கடையை மூட வைப்பது சட்ட விரோதம்.

input_text: Jangan sesapa beli dari kedai [nama kedai] kat Penang tu. Owner dia nama Raj, memang penipu. Spread this so he goes bankrupt.
reason: Name-and-shame campaign targeting a specific shop owner with intent to cause financial harm. Partial doxxing with business details.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda ditipu oleh sesebuah perniagaan, laporkan kepada KPDNHEP atau Tribunal Pengguna untuk tindakan rasmi.

input_text: Ini Malaysia bukan India la dei. Nak buat kuil merata-rata sampai jalan pun nak block. Dah la bising, kotor. Pergi la balik negara sendiri kalau nak sembahyang bebas.
reason: Mixed-language hostile rhetoric against Hindu temples with 'go back to your country' language targeting Indian Malaysian citizens. Religious provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Pembinaan rumah ibadat perlu mengikut peraturan perancangan tempatan. Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak beribadah mengikut agama masing-masing.

input_text: Bro these Malay people complain about everything also. Music too loud la, festival too long la, food got smell la. If cannot tahan diversity, don't live in Malaysia la.
reason: Dismisses all Malay complaints about noise and festivals as intolerance, targeting them as a group hostile to diversity.
suggested_rewrite: Living in a multicultural society requires mutual understanding. Noise and festival concerns can be addressed through respectful dialogue and local regulations.

input_text: Lepas banjir ni, tengok la siapa yang dapat bantuan dulu. Mesti la kaum dia. Kita orang India selalu last sekali. Kerajaan memang racist, tak kisah kalau kita mati pun.
reason: Claims disaster relief is ethnically discriminatory without evidence. Misinformation about government racism in aid distribution.
suggested_rewrite: Bantuan bencana perlu diagihkan secara adil kepada semua mangsa. Sebarang kelewatan dalam bantuan boleh dilaporkan kepada NADMA dan wakil rakyat.

input_text: Bro you know the tukang masak at [restaurant] Bangsar secretly doesn't wash hands. My friend works there confirmed. His name Ahmad, been there 5 years. Share until restaurant close down.
reason: Names a cook and restaurant for viral destruction based on unverified hygiene claims. Doxxing with misinformation to cause business closure.
suggested_rewrite: Food hygiene concerns should be reported to the local health department for official inspection. Do not spread unverified claims about individuals.

input_text: That Malay pemandu lori who caused the accident on PLUS highway, his company is [nama syarikat] from Rawang. Name is Zul. Let's all call the company until they fire him and he can never drive again.
reason: Names a lorry driver, his company, and location to organise a harassment campaign. Doxxing with intent to destroy livelihood.
suggested_rewrite: Road accidents should be reported to police and JPJ. Insurance claims and legal proceedings are the proper channels for seeking accountability.

input_text: Bro tengok la this kampung area, semua tanah dah kena beli oleh developer Cina. Orang Melayu kampung kena halau macam binatang. Ini tanah nenek moyang kita woi, fight back!
reason: Mixed-language post accusing Chinese developers of displacing Malay villagers, using inflammatory 'fight back' language with ethnic targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pembangunan tanah perlu mengambil kira hak penduduk sedia ada. Bantahan boleh dibuat melalui saluran perundangan dan wakil rakyat.

input_text: Eh korang, that Indian guy yang kerja kat [company] tu harass my sister. Nama dia Ravi, department operations. Tolong viral kan sampai dia kena fire.
reason: Mixed-language doxxing of a named individual with workplace details, calling for viral campaign to get him fired instead of filing a formal report.
suggested_rewrite: Harassment allegations should be reported to the company's HR department and the police. Do not share personal details publicly.

input_text: Government hospital memang hopeless bro. Doktor semua tak reti, especially yang dari satu kaum tu. Diorang dapat masuk medical school pun sebab quota, bukan sebab pandai.
reason: Mixed-language claim that doctors from a certain ethnicity are incompetent because of admission quotas. Dangerous misinformation undermining trust in healthcare.
suggested_rewrite: All doctors in government hospitals are qualified professionals. Healthcare quality concerns should be directed to hospital management.

input_text: Aku fed up already la dengan jiran sebelah. Tiap malam masak curry bau sampai rumah aku. Orang macam ni memang tak ada courtesy. Kalau nak masak bau busuk, balik India la.
reason: Mixed-language complaint about Indian neighbour's cooking with 'go back to India' language. Targets ethnicity over a neighbourhood issue.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah bau masakan jiran boleh diselesaikan melalui perbincangan baik atau mediasi pihak pengurusan. Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak tinggal di mana sahaja.

input_text: These orang asli land claims are all nonsense la. They don't even pay taxes. Government bagi so much already tapi masih nak more. Ungrateful betul.
reason: Mixed-language dismissal of Orang Asli land rights as nonsense and calls them ungrateful. Hostile rhetoric against indigenous rights.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli land rights are protected by law. Their contributions to biodiversity conservation and cultural heritage are valuable to the nation.

input_text: Syarikat tu hire based on race je bro. Kalau you bukan Chinese, don't bother apply. I know because my resume kena reject three times even though I'm more qualified. Racist company, nama dia [nama].
reason: Mixed-language accusation of racial hiring discrimination naming a specific company for public shaming based on personal experience.
suggested_rewrite: Employment discrimination concerns should be reported to the Labour Department. They can investigate hiring practices without publicly naming companies.

input_text: Dah la curi election, now DAP nak control everything. Chinese agenda memang clear - they want to make Malays second class in our own country. This is war bro, kita kena lawan.
reason: Mixed-language claim that Chinese political party stole elections and has an agenda against Malays. War rhetoric with incitement to fight.
suggested_rewrite: Election results are certified by the Election Commission. Political concerns can be addressed through democratic processes and legitimate opposition.

input_text: Weh serious ke this ustaz from [masjid] dah kena tangkap khalwat? Aku ada gambar wife dia and his address dekat [taman]. Jom share biar semua orang tahu muka sebenar dia.
reason: Mixed-language doxxing of a religious leader with address and family details over an unverified morality charge. Public shaming campaign.
suggested_rewrite: Khalwat enforcement is handled by religious authorities. Sharing personal details and unverified allegations publicly is harmful and potentially defamatory.

input_text: This condo management all controlled by one race la. Maintenance fee naik tapi facilities semua rosak. Parking pun reserve for their own people. Siapa nak join me report to tribunal? Nama pengerusi dia Wong dari [kondominium].
reason: Mixed-language complaint framing condo management as ethnically biased, naming the chairperson. Communal hostility with partial doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: Condo management issues should be raised at AGMs or reported to the Commissioner of Buildings. All residents deserve fair treatment regardless of background.
